creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Light up your Ramadan nights at Al Seef! 

The traditional shopping and dining destination sparkles this Holy Month! With stunning light installations and magical walkways, it is a beautiful place to embrace the spirit of season. 

🥘 Have your iftar and suhoor by the creek
🚶‍♀️ Stroll in the winding alleys and find fascinating art and light displays
🏰 Listen to a live story telling
🎵 Watch musical performances
🛍 Shop at the souq

Tag your family and friends. 

🗓 until end of Ramadan
